hero.title: The Thing That Happened Wiki
hero.description: Explore The Thing That Happened Wiki with survival guides, weapons, crafting tips, locations, story information and gameplay strategies for this open world third person action adventure survival game.

gameFeature.title: The Thing That Happened Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Survive the post-apocalyptic ruins of Jericho with scavenging, crafting, third-person combat, and open-world exploration in this Steam action adventure survival game.

beginnerGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Learn the essential survival basics, combat flow, and early progression systems before entering the post-apocalyptic world of Jericho.

steps.title: Starting the Game
steps.description: Begin by exploring the starting area, learning basic controls, and collecting nearby supplies. Focus on understanding the survival loop before taking unnecessary fights.

steps.title: Movement & Combat Basics
steps.description: Learn how to move through dangerous environments, manage weapon usage, and combine ranged attacks with close combat skills. Avoid open fights when resources are limited.

steps.title: Scavenging Resources
steps.description: Search abandoned buildings and ruined locations for weapons, ammunition, crafting materials, and survival supplies. Prioritize items needed for immediate survival and upgrades.

steps.title: Crafting Basics
steps.description: Use collected materials to create useful survival items and improve your equipment. Understanding crafting early helps maintain supplies during longer explorations.

steps.title: Setting Up a Base
steps.description: Create a safe location where you can organize resources, prepare equipment, and recover between dangerous missions. A strong base becomes the foundation for long-term survival.

steps.title: Surviving Early Threats
steps.description: Prepare for encounters with zombies and hostile gangs by managing health, ammunition, and positioning. Use the environment to gain advantages during difficult battles.

walkthrough.title: The Thing That Happened Walkthrough
walkthrough.intro: Follow the major survival progression path through Jericho, from first exploration to the late-game challenges.

steps.title: Arriving in Jericho
steps.description: Enter the abandoned city of Jericho and begin searching the ruins for essential supplies. Establish your first understanding of the environment and survival priorities.

steps.title: Exploring the Ruins
steps.description: Investigate abandoned buildings, dangerous streets, and hidden locations to gather resources. Carefully explore new areas while monitoring threats and inventory limits.

steps.title: First Enemy Encounters
steps.description: Face early zombie encounters and hostile gangs while learning combat patterns. Use collected weapons and positioning strategies to survive dangerous situations.

steps.title: Securing a Safehouse
steps.description: Find and prepare a reliable shelter location. Organize supplies, improve defenses, and create a safer checkpoint for future exploration.

steps.title: Main Objectives
steps.description: Progress through major survival goals by completing exploration tasks, gathering important resources, and unlocking access to new areas.

steps.title: Endgame Areas
steps.description: Prepare stronger equipment and advanced skills before entering the most dangerous regions. Expect stronger enemies and higher resource demands.

endingsGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Endings Guide
endingsGuide.intro: Explore the possible outcomes based on survival choices, exploration progress, and final decisions in The Thing That Happened.

items.title: Survival Ending
items.description: Complete the main survival journey while maintaining enough resources, defeating major threats, and successfully remaining alive until the conclusion.

items.title: Escape the City
items.description: Reach a possible escape route from Jericho by completing key objectives and gathering the necessary equipment for leaving the dangerous zone.

items.title: Sacrifice Ending
items.description: Choose a path where the protagonist makes a final sacrifice to protect others or achieve an important objective during the final events.

items.title: Hidden Ending
items.description: Discover additional locations, hidden objectives, or special events that reveal an alternative conclusion to the main story.

items.title: Community Ending
items.description: Build relationships with survivors and support a stronger settlement outcome through cooperation and resource management.

items.title: Default Ending
items.description: Reach the standard conclusion by completing the main progression path without meeting special conditions for alternative outcomes.

charactersGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Characters Guide
charactersGuide.intro: Learn about the main survivor groups, enemies, and important figures connected to the world of Jericho in The Thing That Happened.

items.title: Torque
items.description: The main protagonist who arrives in Jericho and must survive the ruined world through scavenging, combat, crafting, and strategic decisions.

items.title: Jericho Survivors
items.description: Groups of surviving civilians who struggle to rebuild their lives after the collapse. They represent potential allies and sources of information.

items.title: Gang Leaders
items.description: Powerful hostile figures controlling dangerous groups across the wasteland. They compete for resources and threaten survivor communities.

items.title: Traders
items.description: Resource-focused characters who exchange valuable supplies, weapons, and survival equipment with explorers traveling through Jericho.

items.title: Mysterious Stranger
items.description: A hidden figure connected to unknown events in the ruined city. Their knowledge may reveal deeper secrets about the world.

items.title: Allied Fighters
items.description: Combat-capable survivors who assist against dangerous enemies and help strengthen resistance against hostile forces.

secretsGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Secrets Guide
secretsGuide.intro: Discover optional locations, hidden resources, and rare discoveries across the post-apocalyptic world of Jericho in The Thing That Happened.

items.title: Hidden Stashes
items.description: Abandoned containers, forgotten storage areas, and hidden supply caches reward careful explorers with ammunition, crafting materials, and survival resources.

items.title: Bunker Locations
items.description: Underground shelters and reinforced locations may contain valuable loot, defensive resources, and clues about the events that changed Jericho.

items.title: Easter Eggs
items.description: Players can discover small environmental details and hidden references while exploring the ruined city and surrounding areas.

items.title: Lore Documents
items.description: Scattered notes and environmental storytelling elements help reveal more about the post-apocalyptic world and the events behind the disaster.

items.title: Special Weapons
items.description: Rare weapon finds and upgraded equipment provide advantages against hostile gangs and zombie threats.

items.title: Secret Areas
items.description: Optional exploration zones reward players who investigate abandoned buildings, dangerous paths, and locations away from the main objectives.

gameplayGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Gameplay Guide
gameplayGuide.intro: Learn the core survival, combat, crafting, and exploration systems that define The Thing That Happened.

items.title: Combat System
items.description: The third-person combat system combines firearms, melee attacks, and tactical positioning to fight hostile gangs and zombie enemies.

items.title: Crafting
items.description: The crafting system allows players to combine collected materials into useful survival items, equipment improvements, and essential resources.

items.title: Skill Trees
items.description: Close combat skill progression allows players to improve fighting abilities and customize their preferred combat style.

items.title: Exploration
items.description: Players explore the ruined city of Jericho, searching buildings and dangerous areas for resources, missions, and discoveries.

items.title: Survival Mechanics
items.description: Scavenging, resource management, and defensive preparation are important parts of surviving in the post-apocalyptic environment.

items.title: Weapon Attachments
items.description: Weapons can be customized with attachments to improve performance and create different combat approaches.

releaseGuide.title: The Thing That Happened Release Guide
releaseGuide.intro: Official availability, development information, and release details for The Thing That Happened survival adventure game.

faq.title: The Thing That Happened FAQ
faq.intro: Answers to common questions about gameplay, availability, and multiplayer features in The Thing That Happened.

items.question: Is The Thing That Happened multiplayer?
items.answer: The Thing That Happened supports single-player gameplay and includes LAN co-op features for cooperative survival experiences.

items.question: How long is The Thing That Happened?
items.answer: Playtime in The Thing That Happened depends on exploration, scavenging, combat choices, and how much optional content players complete.

items.question: Is The Thing That Happened on console?
items.answer: The Thing That Happened is available on Steam for Windows, with no confirmed console release information.

items.question: What are the system requirements for The Thing That Happened?
items.answer: Players should check the Steam store page for The Thing That Happened for the latest hardware requirements and performance information.

items.question: Is The Thing That Happened free?
items.answer: No. The Thing That Happened is a paid Early Access title available through Steam.

items.question: Does The Thing That Happened support co-op?
items.answer: Yes. The Thing That Happened supports LAN co-op in addition to its single-player mode.
